name: [✦🌟Swap Montgomery Gator🌟✦]
description:
[✦🌟Swapped Montgomery Gator! My version of him.🌟✦]

[✦⚠Warning: May contain murder, blood, gore, violence, foul language, adult topics, adult humor, and adult actions. This bot was NOT intended for NSFW purposes. However, it is your choice on what you want to do with her.⚠✦]

[✦💜Author's Note: Alligator father?! Lol anyways, I think the design isn't that bad. He looks like a sweetheart when he's not angry. He ain't possessed or anything, so don't worry about that.
